activities_projects.title: Meristematic Tissue Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify regions of meristematic tissue in plants
steps: Observe the tip of roots and stems in plants
Identify apical meristem regions
Draw the observed plant part and label the meristem
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes location and function of meristematic tissues

activities_projects.title: Simple vs Complex Tissue Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Understand the difference between simple and complex tissues
steps: List simple tissues such as parenchyma, collenchyma, sclerenchyma
List complex tissues such as xylem and phloem
Prepare a comparison table

activities_projects.title: Stomata Function Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of stomata in plants
steps: Observe stomata under a microscope
Note the presence of guard cells
Explain the role of stomata in transpiration and gas exchange

activities_projects.title: Permanent Tissue Classification Chart
steps: Prepare a chart showing simple and complex permanent tissues
Include examples and functions
Decorate and label clearly

activities_projects.title: Connective Tissue Research Activity
steps: List connective tissues such as bone, cartilage, blood and adipose tissue
Write their functions
Present findings in a table
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies structure and function of connective tissues

activities_projects.title: Muscle Movement Demonstration
activities_projects.objective: Observe muscle movement in the human body
steps: Bend and stretch your arm repeatedly
Observe contraction and relaxation of muscles
Write observations about muscle function

activities_projects.title: Neuron Structure Study
activities_projects.objective: Study the structure of a neuron
steps: Draw a detailed neuron diagram
Label dendrite, axon and cell body
Write the function of each part

activities_projects.title: Animal Tissue Examples Collection
activities_projects.objective: Identify tissues in different body organs
steps: List organs like skin, heart and brain
Identify the tissues present in them
Prepare a table linking tissues to organs

activities_projects.title: Vascular Bundle Diagram
steps: Draw a vascular bundle diagram
Label xylem and phloem
Explain their transport functions

activities_projects.title: Tissue Role in Plants Report
activities_projects.objective: Explain the importance of plant tissues
steps: Write a short report about plant tissues
Include meristematic and permanent tissues
Explain their roles in plant growth
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands importance of tissues in plant growth
